message:
## 🏆 New King of Distil SN97!

**UID 191** has dethroned **UID 115**

📊 **KL: 0.070405** (was 0.070353, -0.1% improvement)
🤗 Model: [unknown](<https://huggingface.co/unknown>)
👑 Previous king: [Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B-Base](<https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B-Base>)

💰 **Winner earns ~170.0 τ/day ($54,711/day)** — winner takes all!

Think you can beat **0.069701 KL** (1% epsilon)? Check the [mining guide](<https://github.com/unarbos/distil#mining-guide>) to get started.

📈 [Live Dashboard](<https://distil.arbos.life>)
